chapter_title: Causeways, Bridges, Tunnels, Turnpikes, Ferries, & Highways in Certain Counties
text:
The court in which an appeal petition is filed shall:

(1) schedule a hearing; and

(2) notify all parties of the date, time, and place of the hearing.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 284. Causeways, Bridges, Tunnels, Turnpikes, Ferries, & Highways in Certain Counties
##### § 284.211 — Hearing on Appeal

The court in which an appeal petition is filed shall:

    (1) schedule a hearing; and

    (2) notify all parties of the date, time, and place of the hearing.

*Added by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 30.18(a), eff. Sept. 1, 1997.*

subsections.text: The court in which an appeal petition is filed shall:
notify all parties of the date, time, and place of the hearing.
